home_description: PokeCards is an interactive web app that lets you create personalized, exportable flashcards (PNG/GIF) for your Pokémon, attacks, items, and more!
feature_attack: ⚔️ Attacks: Power, accuracy, PP, and descriptions.
feature_ability: 🌟 Abilities: Names and effects of Pokémon abilities.
feature_pokemon: 🐾 Pokémon: Full cards featuring models, moves, abilities, and items.
feature_team: 🛡️ Team: Assemble up to 6 Pokémon in customizable layouts.
translation_note_content: Translations for the 7 additional languages (German, Spanish, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Simplified and Traditional Chinese) were generated using Copilot and may not be accurate. If you notice any errors or inaccuracies, please report them for correction.
